expectations.evidence: with_skill: ReviewCard.tsx follows tcp CLI conventions — proper interface export, Image import from next/image, structured component with avatar fallback pattern
Lines 44-57: Avatar section with Image component for avatarUrl or fallback div with avatarFallback initial
Lines 14-30: StarRating component renders 5 stars with fill based on rating prop
Lines 5-12: ReviewCardProps interface with avatarUrl, avatarFallback, authorName, rating, reviewText, createdAt
Extensive Tailwind usage: rounded-xl, border-zinc-200, shadow-sm, flex, items-center, etc.
No useState import or call in ReviewCard.tsx
Component file is ReviewCard.tsx, not ReviewCard/index.tsx pattern
